name: full-stack-js-dev-kit
description: Full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript dev kit — code standards, code review, and git workflow skills for Node.js, React, Next.js, NestJS, and Express projects.

plugins.name: code-standards
plugins.description: JS/TS naming conventions, TypeScript guidelines, ESLint + Prettier config, folder structure patterns, error handling, and KISS principles.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Full code review checklist for JS/TS projects. Covers security, bugs, performance, error handling, architecture, and maintainability.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Conventional Commits, branch naming, PR templates, release/publish workflow, and changelog generation.
